stockMarket.summary: U.S. stock futures declined as geopolitical tensions in Iran escalate following President Trump's hawkish statements, reversing de-escalation hopes. Oil prices surged significantly (WTI +7.65%, Brent +7.63%), while the Nasdaq 100 index officially entered correction territory (down 10% from highs).
notableMoves: Oil surge: WTI crude at $107.80/bbl (+7.65%), Brent at $108.90/bbl (+7.63%).
Market correction: Nasdaq 100 officially in correction (down 10% from all-time highs).
Sentiment: US stock futures lower as Middle East conflict concerns deepen.

exhibitions: Several Eternities in a Day (Hammer Museum, Apr 5 - Aug 23)
